channel.title: Orthodox Christian Sermons: Feasts of the Saints:January 24
channel.description: Audio Orthodox Christian Sermons: Feasts of the Saints:January 24

item.title: Feasts of the Saints, 20112
item.description: :Feasts of the Saints. Highlights from the life of Xenia of Petersburg, with the most important question for us: will we love as she loved? We also compare her life with that of Timothy of Esphigmenou, which outwardly appears different, but at its core is the same.
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: :Feasts of the Saints. Highlights from the life of Xenia of Petersburg, with the most important question for us: will we love as she loved? We also compare her life with that of Timothy of Esphigmenou, which outwardly appears different, but at its core is the same.
